reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Moved the percpu_up_read() slowpath out of the inline function into a new __percpu_up_read() to avoid binary size increase from adding a tracepoint to an inlined function.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series extracts the percpu_up_read() slowpath into a new __percpu_up_read() function to avoid binary size increase from adding a tracepoint to an inlined function. The change is made by moving the relevant code from the inline function to a separate function, which is then exported as a symbol.
